Such a huge escalation to 11+ discrete violent events by organized actors targeting non-combatants within 30 days is extremely improbable. The short-term forecast dates receive the lowest allowed base probability (0.05), and this rises very slightly for the later dates to account for the longer time horizons and inherent unpredictability over 6 months.
